name: Branch API
summary: Backend API for Git branch operations including listing, switching, and creating branches
goals: Provide secure Git branch operations via REST API
Handle branch operations with proper conflict detection

specDetail.description: Exposes Git branch API endpoints under /api/branches. GET /api/branches/:projectId returns all branches. POST /api/branches/:projectId/switch switches the working tree. POST /api/branches/:projectId/create creates a new branch.

parameters.name: branchName
parameters.description: Target branch name for switch or create operations

parameters.name: startPoint
parameters.description: Starting point for new branch (default: HEAD)

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force switch even with uncommitted changes (default false)

constraints: Must sanitize branch names to prevent command injection
Must detect and report uncommitted changes before switching
Must handle merge conflicts gracefully during branch operations

acceptanceCriteria.given: a project repository with a clean working tree
acceptanceCriteria.when: POST /api/branches/:projectId/switch is called with an existing branch name
acceptanceCriteria.then: the working tree is switched to the target branch and success is returned

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
